summary: Verified Contact page (/contact) layout bug fix and regression on Global Presence (/about/global-presence) + Contact form submission. All 5 review requirements PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: AboutPage.jsx destinationRegions still declared inline and duplicates destinationMarkers list in AnimatedOfficeMap.jsx — consider consolidating into /src/data/geo.js (carry-over from iteration_16).
AnimatedOfficeMap.jsx: conditional `fill` prop pattern is clean; consider adding PropTypes/JSDoc for the 5 props (showDestinations, fill, legendInside, showFlows, title) for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: One contact form submission POST /api/contact with unique email test_<timestamp>@example.com (name 'Test User Automation').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact page bug fix verified via Playwright on production preview URL: (1) Left column on /contact — AnimatedOfficeMap (data-testid animated-office-map) renders at top of the space-y-4 block, then 'Trading Offices' heading (Doha | Geneva | Dubai | Istanbul | Singapore) and 'Origination Offices' heading (Russia | Ukraine | Kazakhstan | Canada) appear immediately after with only a 16px gap between the map bottom and the Trading Offices heading top (was previously a large empty gap due to mt-auto + h-full stretching). (2) Contact map legend shows ONLY 'Trading Office' and 'Origination' — no 'Destination Market' text present, paths=0, animateMotion=0 (no trade flows). (3) Regression PASS on /about/global-presence: animated-office-map has 16 <path> and 8 <animateMotion> elements, legend contains Trading Office + Origination + Destination Market; four framed cards (commodities-frame, map-legend-tradingoffices, map-legend-origination, map-legend-destinationmarkets) all present in a single-row layout (identical top offset). (4) Contact form submission works end-to-end: fill contact-form-name/email/message, click contact-form-submit → 'Message Sent!' confirmation appears within ~2s. Backend /api/contact returned success. No console errors observed.
rca of the issue: Original bug: On /contact, the left column had a big empty gap above 'Trading Offices'. Root cause was AnimatedOfficeMap root using h-full unconditionally combined with the parent flex column being stretched via items-stretch, plus mt-auto on the map+offices block. Fix (in AnimatedOfficeMap.jsx line 132): root div now `flex flex-col ${fill ? 'h-full' : ''}` — fill is false on Contact so map only takes intrinsic aspect-ratio (1264/732) space, and Trading/Origination headings sit directly beneath it. Verified: gap between map bottom and Trading heading top = 16px (was >200px).
